top_signals.title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
top_signals.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
